examples: He knew it was a strategy with a high risk of self-immolation.
Though immolation-abased, he always likes to put on an indomitable mask.
"Stealth" will now be broken correctly by damage shield such as "Oil of Immolation".
Is the moral purpose of those who are good, self-immolation for the sake of those who are evil?
During the debate, parliamentary speaker Mustapha Ben Jaafar referred to Mr Khedhri's self-immolation.
